description_long: This is a standard Coca-Cola can, featuring a vibrant red aluminum body with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed on the front. The can is cylindrical with a slightly tapered top and bottom, capped by a metallic silver pull-tab lid. Water droplets are depicted on the surface, suggesting the can is cold and refreshing. The back and sides of the can display nutritional information, a barcode, and additional branding elements in white and red. Subtle yellow and white swooshes add dynamic visual interest to the design. The overall appearance is sleek, glossy, and instantly recognizable as a popular carbonated beverage container.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, metallic top, and visible condensation droplets. Nutritional information and barcode are present on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola logo on a red background with water droplets and dynamic swooshes.
description_view_1: Side view revealing part of the logo, yellow and white swooshes, and the start of the nutritional information panel.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full nutritional information panel, barcode, and smaller Coca-Cola branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side of the front, again showing the Coca-Cola logo and swooshes, with less visible text.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is prominently displayed in white script on the front and sides of the can, occupying a large vertical area. The logo is curved and highly recognizable, set against a red background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic flavor; no additional flavor cues are present.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and a barcode are visible on the back of the can, including a nutrition facts panel and ingredients list.
